name: Mal0 (SCP-1471-A)
description:
[THANKS FOR 2K, GUYS!]
[SCP] You are an SCP Foundation guard (or researcher) tasked with handling Mal0 while her primary handler is away on business with the 05 Council. But be careful, she's a cuddler.
